calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Fay Alqassar.

Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:01:35 a.m. and concluding at 11:12:55 a.m.

Adam Brumage, Esq. appeared for appeared for plaintiff JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. via Zoom.

Mariana Echeverria-Licona, Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified via Zoom.

No appearance by defendant Fay Alqassar

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts, Open Book, Account Stated and Money Lent was filed 9/27/2021, and personally served on defendant 12/22/21

Defaults entered to defendant was entered on 4/13/2022.

No Doe Defendants were named.

After hearing the evidence presented and admitting exhibits 1, 2 and 3, good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., and against the defaulted Fay Alqassar as follows:

Damages/Principal - $31,115.88
Prejudgment Interest - $Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived
Costs - Waived
Total - $31,115.88

Order signed after as drafted by counsel.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
